scripts.dev: sh -c 'socket="$(pwd)/../proxy/.wrangler/docker-privileged.sock"; for i in $(seq 1 100); do [ -S "$socket" ] && break; sleep 0.1; done; [ -S "$socket" ] || { echo "Docker proxy socket not found at $socket. Run root pnpm dev or pnpm --filter docker-proxy dev."; exit 1; }; DOCKER_HOST="unix://$socket" wrangler dev --port 8787 --inspector-port 9231'
